nodes.name: hopfield_demo.rs
nodes.summary: Demo of Modern Hopfield Networks: stores orthogonal patterns and tests perfect, noisy, top-k retrieval, and beta-parameter effects on attention sharpness.

nodes.name: cosine_similarity
nodes.summary: Computes cosine similarity between two f32 vectors used to verify Hopfield retrieval fidelity.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Driver running five Hopfield demos: perfect retrieval, noisy retrieval, top-k, capacity, and beta-parameter comparison.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Catalog of bio-inspired nervous-system examples organized by Tier 1-4 with architecture diagram, tutorial, and performance targets.

nodes.name: t1_anomaly_detection.rs
nodes.summary: Tier 1 always-on anomaly detector with reflex gates, BTSP-style adaptive thresholds, temporal pattern detection, and cascade alerts plus witness logs.

nodes.name: TelemetryEvent
nodes.summary: Telemetry event with timestamp, source/metric ids, and value used as input to the detector.

nodes.name: AnomalyAlert
nodes.summary: Anomaly alert payload combining the triggering event, type, severity, and witness log.

nodes.name: AnomalyType
nodes.summary: Variants for value, temporal, structural, and cascade anomalies.

nodes.name: WitnessLog
nodes.summary: Explainable witness log capturing inputs, threshold, and decision path at trigger time.

nodes.name: ReflexGate
nodes.summary: Spiking reflex gate that integrates inputs and fires on threshold breach with refractory period.

nodes.name: AdaptiveThreshold
nodes.summary: BTSP-style adaptive threshold with eligibility trace that tightens or loosens after feedback.

nodes.name: TemporalPatternDetector
nodes.summary: Tracks inter-event intervals and emits TemporalAnomaly when timing deviates beyond tolerance.

nodes.name: AnomalyDetectionSystem
nodes.summary: Top-level anomaly detector orchestrating reflex gates, adaptive thresholds, temporal detectors, and cascade detection.

nodes.name: t1_edge_autonomy.rs
nodes.summary: Tier 1 edge autonomy stack: safety reflexes, stability via dendritic coincidence, bullet-time bursts, policy loop, and graceful degradation.

nodes.name: ReflexArc
nodes.summary: Deterministic reflex with bounded latency that emits a high-priority ControlAction when its sensor crosses threshold.

nodes.name: StabilityController
nodes.summary: Dendritic coincidence detector fusing accelerometer and gyroscope into a stability membrane potential.

nodes.name: BulletTimeController
nodes.summary: Activates high-fidelity sample rate during critical moments and decays back to normal once urgency drops.

nodes.name: PolicyLoop
nodes.summary: Slow optimization loop that runs at 10 Hz, reducing motor speed when battery is low.

nodes.name: EdgeAutonomySystem
nodes.summary: Hierarchical edge autonomy controller composing reflexes, stability, bullet time, policy, and degradation levels.

nodes.name: t1_medical_wearable.rs
nodes.summary: Tier 1 personalized medical wearable: sparse-spike encoding, one-shot personal baselines, PID homeostasis, and circadian-aware alerts.

nodes.name: PersonalBaseline
nodes.summary: Per-user circadian baseline learned via BTSP-style one-shot updates with z-score anomaly detection.

nodes.name: HomeostaticController
nodes.summary: PID-style controller emitting Stable/Monitor/Adjust/Urgent responses around a target setpoint.

nodes.name: SparseEncoder
nodes.summary: Delta-modulation spike encoder emitting only when the input changes more than a threshold, saving power.

nodes.name: MedicalWearableSystem
nodes.summary: Top-level wearable system holding per-signal baselines, homeostasis controllers, encoders, and alert history.

nodes.name: t2_adaptive_simulation.rs
nodes.summary: Tier 2 digital twin with adaptive fidelity controller, bullet time, predictive model, and continuous learning from real measurements.

nodes.name: FidelityController
nodes.summary: Decides simulation fidelity (Low/Medium/High/BulletTime) from urgency and tracks recent prediction error.

nodes.name: PredictiveModel
nodes.summary: Linear extrapolation predictor with learned bias trained by gradient descent on prediction error.

nodes.name: DigitalTwin
nodes.summary: Digital twin orchestrating components, fidelity controller, predictive model, and cumulative compute cost.

nodes.name: t2_self_optimizing.rs
nodes.summary: Tier 2 self-optimizing software monitor: cascade reflex with circuit breakers, coordination pattern learner, and structural witness logs.

nodes.name: CircuitBreaker
nodes.summary: Closed/Open/HalfOpen circuit breaker with failure threshold and reset timeout.

nodes.name: CascadeReflex
nodes.summary: Detects cascading failures across components and opens breakers to shed load.

nodes.name: PatternLearner
nodes.summary: Observes inter-component call traces and learns expected sequences and latencies for anomaly checking.

nodes.name: SelfOptimizingSystem
nodes.summary: Top-level self-optimizing monitor combining cascade reflex, pattern learner, latency trackers, and witnesses.

nodes.name: t2_swarm_intelligence.rs
nodes.summary: Tier 2 decentralized swarm with local reflexes, Kuramoto coherence gates, collective voting, and resilience to partial node failure.

nodes.name: LocalReflex
nodes.summary: Per-node spiking reflex with leak and refractory period that emits a local action when threshold is crossed.

nodes.name: CoherenceGate
nodes.summary: Kuramoto-oscillator coherence gate computing phase synchrony and communication gain across neighbors.

nodes.name: CollectiveDecision
nodes.summary: Quorum-based collective decision tracker that resolves when enough nodes have voted or deadline passes.

nodes.name: SwarmNode
nodes.summary: Swarm participant binding a local reflex, coherence gate, neighbors, and pending decisions.

nodes.name: SwarmNetwork
nodes.summary: Simulation harness that delivers messages, ticks nodes, and reports global order parameter and responsive node count.

nodes.name: t3_bio_machine.rs
nodes.summary: Tier 3 bio-machine interface for prosthetics: biological timing adaptation, reflex integration modes, and Gaussian intent decoding.

nodes.name: BiologicalTimingAdapter
nodes.summary: Learns the user's reaction time and natural rhythm and provides matched response delays and movement durations.

nodes.name: ReflexIntegrator
nodes.summary: Coordinates machine reflexes with user reflexes across Assist, Complement, Amplify, and Takeover modes.

nodes.name: IntentDecoder
nodes.summary: Learns biosignal templates per intent and decodes the highest-confidence match using Gaussian similarity.

nodes.name: BioMachineInterface
nodes.summary: End-to-end bio-machine interface that fuses timing adapter, reflex integrator, and intent decoder into machine actions.

nodes.name: t3_self_awareness.rs
nodes.summary: Tier 3 metacognitive monitor for structural self-sensing: capability tracking, degradation prediction, and uncertainty expression.

nodes.name: MetacognitiveMonitor
nodes.summary: Observes InternalState, detects incoherence, internal anomalies, resource warnings, and predicts capability degradation.

nodes.name: SelfAwareSystem
nodes.summary: Self-aware agent with modules, attention focus, and an introspect/express_uncertainty API.

nodes.name: t3_synthetic_nervous.rs
nodes.summary: Tier 3 synthetic nervous system for buildings: local environment reflexes, zone homeostasis, environment workspace, and emergent policies.

nodes.name: LocalEnvironmentReflex
nodes.summary: Local sensor-driven reflex that fires environment actuator responses when readings cross threshold.

nodes.name: ZoneHomeostasis
nodes.summary: Zone-level homeostasis controller maintaining environmental setpoints with adaptive tolerance.

nodes.name: EnvironmentWorkspace
nodes.summary: Global workspace broadcasting environmental items across zones for coherent multi-zone action.

nodes.name: SyntheticNervousSystem
nodes.summary: Top-level synthetic nervous system tying reflexes, homeostasis, workspace, and emergent policies for environment control.

nodes.name: t4_agentic_self_model.rs
nodes.summary: Tier 4 agentic self-model: cognitive state, circadian clock, coherence/confidence/energy trackers and a SelfAwareAgent that decides whether to accept tasks.

nodes.name: CoherenceTracker
nodes.summary: Tracks rolling coherence statistics for the agent's internal state.

nodes.name: ConfidenceTracker
nodes.summary: Tracks rolling confidence statistics and updates after observed outcomes.

nodes.name: EnergyTracker
nodes.summary: Models the agent's available cognitive energy with depletion and recovery dynamics.

nodes.name: CircadianClock
nodes.summary: Phase-aware circadian clock that biases capability and energy estimates by time of day.

nodes.name: SelfAwareAgent
nodes.summary: Self-aware agent integrating cognitive state and trackers to accept, defer, or refuse tasks honestly.

nodes.name: t4_collective_dreaming.rs
nodes.summary: Tier 4 collective dreaming with experiences, memory traces, swarm phases, and a CollectiveDream that consolidates memory across agents like hippocampal replay.

nodes.name: Experience
nodes.summary: Single learned experience tagged with salience and timestamp.

nodes.name: MemoryTrace
nodes.summary: Persisted memory trace built from one or more experiences with decay and reinforcement.

nodes.name: DreamingAgent
nodes.summary: Per-agent dreamer that replays experiences during low activity to consolidate memory traces.

nodes.name: CollectiveDream
nodes.summary: Coordinator that synchronizes dreaming agents into a swarm-wide phase to share and merge memories.

nodes.name: t4_compositional_hdc.rs
nodes.summary: Tier 4 compositional Hyperdimensional Computing demo: bind/bundle ops on Hypervectors, ConceptMemory store, role queries, and analogy reasoning.

nodes.name: Hypervector
nodes.summary: High-dimensional binary vector with bind, bundle, permute, and similarity operations for HDC reasoning.

nodes.name: ConceptMemory
nodes.summary: Holds named Hypervectors and supports nearest-neighbor cleanup over the concept space.

nodes.name: compose_modifier
nodes.summary: Composes a modifier-concept Hypervector using HDC binding.

nodes.name: compose_sequence
nodes.summary: Builds an ordered-sequence Hypervector via permute-and-bundle composition.

nodes.name: compose_triple
nodes.summary: Composes a role-filler triple (e.g., subject-verb-object) into a single Hypervector.

nodes.name: query_role
nodes.summary: Unbinds a composed Hypervector by a role key to retrieve the filler vector.

nodes.name: analogy
nodes.summary: Solves A:B::C:? analogies using HDC binding and cleanup, demonstrating zero-shot reasoning.

nodes.name: t4_neuromorphic_rag.rs
nodes.summary: Tier 4 neuromorphic RAG: sparse-encoded memories, coherence-gated retrieval, and a NeuromorphicRAG wrapper delivering ~100x compute reduction.

nodes.name: MemoryEntry
nodes.summary: Stored memory entry with content, sparse encoding, and access statistics.

nodes.name: SparseEncoder
nodes.summary: Sparse encoder turning content into top-k active dimensions for low-cost similarity search.

nodes.name: CoherenceMonitor
nodes.summary: Tracks retrieval coherence to gate when expensive memory expansion should happen.

nodes.name: NeuromorphicMemory
nodes.summary: In-memory neuromorphic store with sparse insertion, top-k retrieval, and per-query stats.

nodes.name: NeuromorphicRAG
nodes.summary: RAG facade composing sparse encoder, neuromorphic memory, and coherence gate for retrieval results.

nodes.name: workspace_demo.rs
nodes.summary: Demonstrates the routing::workspace module: pushes items into the Global Workspace and shows competitive broadcast.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Driver constructing a GlobalWorkspace and exercising broadcast/competition operations.

nodes.name: HDC_IMPLEMENTATION.md
nodes.summary: Implementation notes for the Hyperdimensional Computing module within the nervous-system crate.

nodes.name: HOPFIELD.md
nodes.summary: Design and implementation notes for the Modern Hopfield Networks memory layer.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Top-level README for the ruvector-nervous-system crate covering architecture, features, and usage.

nodes.name: inhibition.rs
nodes.summary: Lateral inhibition primitive: each active unit suppresses neighbors to sharpen selectivity in the compete layer.

nodes.name: LateralInhibition
nodes.summary: Lateral inhibition layer applying neighbor suppression to activations for winner sharpening.

nodes.name: kwta.rs
nodes.summary: K-Winners-Take-All sparsification layer keeping the top-K activations and zeroing the rest.

nodes.name: KWTALayer
nodes.summary: K-Winners-Take-All layer producing sparse activation patterns by keeping only the top-K neurons.

nodes.name: mod.rs
nodes.summary: Module barrel for the compete layer re-exporting LateralInhibition, KWTALayer, and WTALayer.
